# NON-PRODUCTION DEMO FIXTURE: MVP Test Plan

This file is a validation/demo fixture only. It is not a real Test Plan and must not be used for production readiness claims.

## Objective

Validate that the MVP document readiness registry can mark a provided Test Plan input as ready when minimum deterministic metadata and human-readable content expectations are present.

## Target System

Initial Margin HKv14 domain application.

## Applicable Function Spec Version

Function Spec stand-in: Initial Margin Calculation Guide HKv14.

## In Scope Test Types

- Functional checks for Initial Margin calculation guide changes.
- Regression checks for existing Initial Margin behavior.

## Out Of Scope

- External system integrations.
- Real LME API execution.
- Requirement-to-test mapping.
- Automation backlog generation.

## QA Owner And Approver

QA owner / approver role: QA Lead.

## Revision Version

Version: TP-DEMO-1.
